","book_info":{"abstract":"【保安穿越+从零开始+历史争霸+技术流+南宋+秀才造反】
现代保安杨忬，魂穿南宋，成了潭州山沟里的穷酸秀才杨忬。
家徒四壁，唯有一个结发妻子，和一块蒙尘的“杨家将后裔”破牌匾。
面对层层盘剥的胥吏，以及那个走向沉沦的王朝，他撂下圣贤书，咧开了嘴。
当秀才开始不讲道理，历史就得换个写法。
靠初中地理、历史知识。
从占山为王开始，到割据一方让金兵胆寒的“阎王”。
秦桧在朝堂弄权？他在乡下搞土改。名将们想着北伐？他先琢磨怎么让百姓吃饱饭。
这是一个小人物，用最“匪”的方式，再造山河的传奇。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/1dbb6428b7a7c8f207763e6596ab3dfa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"黑哥叼叼烟","author_id":"","book_id":"7591504498271472664","book_name":"史上最匪秀才：颠覆南宋再造山河","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4215人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7598933120900940312","read_count":"4215","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"367930"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"159","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,宋朝,争霸,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1dbb6428b7a7c8f207763e6596ab3dfa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446833&x-signature=b4BqFQ26VT8zo7ZxIHVmFMkL8lo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1978725117727396","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318471332ADBCC457AC613F2E27"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"for
